title: hieracium pilosella subsp. pervirescens
intro: Hieracium pilosella subsp. pervirescens, commonly known as yellow hawkweed or devil's paintbrush, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Hieracium pilosella subsp. pervirescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and act as a natural diuretic. Hieracium pilosella subsp. pervirescens is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
